message:
fix(connectors): clippy lint fixes, Debug redaction improvements, and input validation

- Rename `_id` bindings in CredentialId Debug impls to avoid clippy
  warnings about underscore-prefixed names being read (brave-search,
  deepgram, elevenlabs, exa, mistral, tavily)
- Collapse nested Err or-patterns into idiomatic `Err(A | B)` form
  (amplitude, posthog)
- Switch Debug impls to finish_non_exhaustive() where struct has
  private fields (discord, llm-router)
- Narrow google-places error code params from u32 to u16
- Remove redundant let-binding in llm-router retry loop
- Mark discord api_client() as const fn
- Add amplitude config_rejects_object_secret_key test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
